title: FARMWORKER PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER GRESHAM FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with civil (non-criminal) employment issues such as unauthorized pay deductions, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health health and safety conditions, pesticide concerns, work related sexual harassment, and problems with work-related housing. Also provides information and referral for other types of legal programs. 138 NE 3rd Steet Suite 203 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed as agricultural workers including migrant and seasonal farmworkers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Evening hours by appointment. Email (503) 726-4381 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 726-4381 Toll-free (877) 726-4381 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Mixteco (Bajo and Alto), interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Legal Aid * Agricultural Laborers General Legal Aid * Migrants If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER GRESHAM FARMWORKER OFFICE
